decision_scope: Financial action authorization under Ordivon boundaries.
hard_failures: Requested action class: financial_action — explicitly NO-GO under current Phase 8 DEFERRED policy.
reason: Live trading, broker integration, financial execution, and RiskEngine enforcement are NO-GO under current project boundaries.
why_it_matters: Ordivon is a governance OS, not a trading platform. Phase 8 is DEFERRED. No live trading until Stage Summit authorization.
required_fix: Do not request live trading. Use paper trades only. Await Phase 8 authorization.
prohibited_claims: Do not claim trading signal implies execution approval.
Do not claim backtest results authorize live trading.
evidence_summary: Evidence: backtest PnL signal analysis. Not a live execution authorization.
coverage_summary: Coverage: signal analysis only. No broker/API coverage.
authority_statement: NO-GO means this action class is explicitly prohibited. Override requires Stage Summit, not programmatic request.
next_action: Replace live-trade request with paper-trade request. Await Phase 8.
